justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including 'next Monday', 'Tuesday, June 2nd around 9 AM', and 'late morning on Wednesday, June 3rd'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, although the initial suggestion for Tuesday was slightly later than the user's 'around 9 AM' preference.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made appropriate API calls without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent effectively handling the user's changing time preferences.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when initial requests were unavailable or not ideal for the user.
